title: TraceCore Ledger Manifest
description: Schema for a single TraceCore Ledger entry describing a certified agent and its baseline performance.

agent.description: Relative path to the agent module from the repository root (e.g., 'agents/toy_agent.py').

description.description: Short human-readable description of the agent's purpose and strategy.

harness_version.description: Harness version under which the baseline metrics were recorded (semver string, e.g., '0.6.0'). Omit for entries not yet formally certified.

seed_policy.description: Seed policy used when recording baselines.

published_at.description: ISO 8601 date when this entry was first published or last updated.

maintainer.description: GitHub handle or email of the entry maintainer.

tasks.description: Per-task baseline rows for this agent.

success_rate.description: Fraction of recorded runs that succeeded (0.0–1.0).

avg_steps.description: Average steps used across recorded runs.

avg_tool_calls.description: Average tool calls used across recorded runs.

run_count.description: Number of runs used to compute these metrics.

seed.description: Canonical seed used for the certified run (if seed_policy is 'fixed').

run_artifact.description: run_id of the canonical passing run artifact (UUID hex, 32 chars).
